overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a player navigating a dark, abandoned institutional corridor with a flashlight and firearm. The environment features blue-painted cinder block walls, tiled floors, and windows with blinds, suggesting a school or office building setting in a tactical shooter or horror game.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned institutional corridor with cinder block walls

events.description: approaching windows with bright daylight streaming through blinds, illuminating the corridor ahead

agents.ego_description: cautiously advancing down the dark corridor with flashlight and weapon raised, scanning for threats

entered.detail: painted blue lower half with white upper half, showing signs of decay
light-colored square tiles covering the corridor floor
empty metal brackets mounted on the left wall
window with horizontal blinds partially open, allowing light to enter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit institutional corridor with blue-painted cinder block walls. The player moves forward with a flashlight, approaching a distant window where daylight begins to penetrate the darkness. The environment is empty and abandoned, with empty metal brackets visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor section with windows and scattered furniture

events.description: passing through area with strong natural light from windows mixed with flashlight beam
flashlight reveals empty metal shelves and cabinets on the right side of the corridor

agents.ego_description: moving past windows while scanning the right side with flashlight, revealing abandoned furniture and storage units

entered.detail: wooden desk or table with cardboard boxes stacked on top
pink and blue plastic chairs stacked near the table
tall dark metal storage cabinets lining the right wall
fluorescent light fixture on the ceiling providing dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a section of the corridor where daylight streams through windows with blinds, creating a mixed lighting environment. Abandoned furniture including a wooden table with boxes and colorful plastic chairs become visible on the right. The flashlight scans across metal cabinets as the player continues forward, passing the windowed section.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of corridor with lockers and glass doors

events.description: approaching the end of the corridor with glass doors and locker units becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching the end of the hallway, flashlight sweeping across empty shelves and metal lockers

entered.detail: glass panel doors at the end of the corridor with metal frames
open metal shelving units with empty compartments

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player approaching the terminus of the corridor. Empty metal shelves and locker units line the right wall while glass exit doors become visible at the end of the hall. The lighting shifts to rely more on overhead fixtures as the player moves away from the windows, maintaining a cautious advance with flashlight scanning the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dim institutional corridor that transitions from oppressive darkness into a brightly lit, cluttered hallway. It begins in a dimly lit space with blue cinder block walls, where a flashlight cuts through the gloom as the camera advances toward a distant source of daylight. As the player moves forward, the scene opens into a section where sunlight streams through window blinds, illuminating abandoned wooden tables, colorful plastic chairs, and metal cabinets. The environment then shifts away from the windows toward the end of the hall, where the lighting relies more on overhead fixtures. Finally, the camera passes empty metal shelves and locker units before approaching a set of glass exit doors at the terminus of the corridor.
